description: Legal document in Arabic script. Dated: 4 Rajab 596 AH = 20 April 1200 CE. Mentions the name Faḍāʾil(?) b. Manṣūr b. Hilāl. Likely a rental contract, as it refers to a property in Fustat and specifies a period of one year ending Jumādā II 597 AH. Needs further examination.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית מהמאה ה-13. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
